title: AKH® Halloween Hanging Bat Decorations | Pack of 10 | Door Strings Ceiling Paper Bat Decorations for Halloween | Spooky Bat Garland with black string | Bat themed Halloween Party Supplies
features: Dimensional Elegance: Crafted from high-quality paper. 10 Bats (4 x 29cm, 3 x 43cm and 3 x 52cm). 5 metres of black string.
Bat Cutout Decorations: Each bat features meticulously designed cutouts that create a captivating shadow effect when suspended, enhancing the eerie atmosphere of your Halloween setup.
Versatile Placement: Easily hang these decorations from ceilings, doorways, or walls to transform any space into a spooky haunt, ideal for Halloween parties, haunted houses, and festive gatherings.
Simple Installation: The included string and hooks allow effortless assembly, making these hanging bat decorations a quick and hassle-free addition to your Halloween decor.

Reusable Bat Shape Paper Ornaments: With sturdy construction and careful handling, these decorations can be stored and reused for future Halloween celebrations, giving your events a touch of mysterious charm year after year.
description: Elevate your Halloween ambiance with our Halloween Hanging Bat Paper Decorations. Crafted from premium paper, these decorations boast intricate bat cutouts that cast captivating shadows, adding an eerie allure to your space. They create a mesmerizing display suspended from ceilings, doorways, or walls. Effortless to assemble with included string and hooks, these decorations are perfect for Halloween parties, haunted houses, and themed gatherings. Durable and reusable, they offer lasting charm for many spooky seasons to come. Transform your space into a mysterious haunt with these exquisite hanging bat decorations.
